CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISNULL(Result_TotalCP__c),ISNULL(Result_TotalWC__c )), IF( OR(ISNULL(Latest_Forecast_TotalCP__c),ISNULL(Latest_Forecast_TotalWC__c)), IF( OR(ISNULL(Order_Forecast_TotalCP__c),ISNULL(Order_Forecast_TotalWC__c )), WCPercent__c, Order_Forecast_WCPercent__c), Latest_Forecast_WCPercent__c), Result_WCPercent__c)
CustomField.label: WC率(実績>最終予想最新>最終予想受注時>商談)
